patient_summary: 73-year-old female (name: Olivia) with documented mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Noted hematologic diagnoses include postoperative anemia and unspecified anemia. Major recent procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (Piedmont Newnan Hospital, Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Significant laboratory abnormalities include (07/03/2023) ferritin 266.8 (H), iron 41 (L), iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L), triglycerides 158 (H), and VLDL 32 (H). Historical labs include markedly elevated glucose 199 (01/11/2021) and GFR 50 (01/11/2021). Blood pressure goal <140/90 with recent reading 128/78 (01/11/2025). Multiple care teams documented including Hand HA MD (PCP), Hershey CL MD (PCP), and several cardiology, endocrinology, and oncology consultants. There are conflicting demographic entries (DOB and legal sex) and differing smoking-history entries documented across source records.
